tsType.name: signature
tsType.raw: (path: string, parameters?: { [key in string]: string }) => void

errorDetail.description: When set, shows detailed error UI instead of calling onResponse immediately (user must tap Close)

onCloseWithResponse.description: Called when user closes the error view; send failure response then close popup

simulateErrorBannerMessage.description: Global error banner message shown between fee section and transaction data (from simulate error)

messageErrors.description: Per-message validation errors - array aligned with transactionMessages

hasArgumentValidationError.description: Whether argument type validation failed (disables Approve)
